name: rrze-directions
description: Gutenberg block for arrival directions: RRZE-FAUdir addresses, karte.fau.de embed, and OpenRouteService route maps.

scripts.build: wp-scripts build index=./src/index.js view=./src/view.js view-route-map=./src/view-route-map.js rrze-directions-guided-tour=./src/js/rrze-directions-guided-tour.js --webpack-copy-php && npm run increment-version
